title: capsella lingulata
intro: Capsella lingulata, also known as shepherds-cress, is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its distinctive linear leaves and small white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and combat infections. The health benefits of Capsella lingulata include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Capsella lingulata typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
